title: rubus candicans subsp. phyllostachys
intro: Rubus candicans subsp. phyllostachys, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry shrub, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. Rubus candicans subsp. phyllostachys can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
